byDepartment.CSE: Internals each month (sample); semester exams in Nov & May; supplementary within 30 days of results (sample).
byDepartment.ECE: Laboratory evaluations + written internals; semester schedule aligned with academic calendar.
byDepartment.ME: Workshop practicals + theory papers; makeup exams per academic rules (sample).
byDepartment.CE: Studio reviews + written exams; supplementary as per notice.
byDepartment.MBA: Case modules + end-term papers; reappear window in next trimester (sample).
